operations.title: Switch
operations.description: Route to the first case whose simple condition matches (==, !=, >, contains, ...), or to else when none match. Pick each case's destination node in the editor.

parameters.title: Conditions
parameters.name: cases
parameters.description: Ordered left/operator/right conditions, each routed to a destination. The first that matches wins; if none match the else branch runs.
parameters.tooltip: left / operator / right per case; falls through to else

operations.title: Switch (advanced expression)
operations.description: Route to the first case whose template expression is truthy, or to else when none match. Write full gonja/jinja expressions per case. Pick each case's destination node in the editor.

parameters.title: Cases
parameters.name: cases
parameters.description: Ordered case expressions, each routed to a destination. The first truthy one wins; if none are truthy the else branch runs. Each expression is a template, e.g. {{ var.steps["scan"].score > 90 }}.
parameters.tooltip: template expression per case; falls through to else
